title: About Me
content:
Self-Introduction
Hello, my name is Hu Hailong, and I am a 28-year-old full-stack developer. I have a deep passion for coding, which has been a significant part of my daily life and career. From designing intuitive front-end user experiences to building robust back-end systems, I thrive on solving complex problems and continuously improving my skills.
Outside of work, I enjoy running as a way to stay active and clear my mind. The discipline and focus required in running often inspire me to approach coding challenges with a fresh perspective.
I am always excited to collaborate with like-minded individuals, embrace new technologies, and take on projects that push my limits. Thank you for taking the time to learn a bit about me!
